## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `bash scripts/release-preflight.sh`
- [ ] `bash scripts/release-preflight.sh --address` if address parsing predicates or the `address` feature changed

## Release Notes

- [ ] Added/updated a Changeset for TypeScript user-facing changes (`typescript/.changeset/`)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for Rust/workspace release-impacting changes

## Risk Notes

- Any compatibility concerns?
- Any migration notes?
